scripts.build: bun run build:web && bun run build:wrapper && bun run build:concentrator && bun run build:cli && bun run build:agent
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && cd web && bun run typecheck
scripts.install-cli: bun run build && mkdir -p ~/.local/bin && cp bin/rclaude bin/concentrator bin/concentrator-cli bin/rclaude-agent ~/.local/bin/ && cp scripts/revive-session.sh ~/.local/bin/ && echo 'Installed rclaude, concentrator, concentrator-cli, rclaude-agent, and revive-session.sh to ~/.local/bin'
